name: combobox
title: Combobox
description: Unstyled combobox component with label, trigger, input, chips, clear, list, items, groups, empty, status, positioning, built on Base UI

files.content:
import { tv } from "@/registry/bare/lib/tv.config";

export const comboboxStyles = tv({
  slots: {
    label: [""],
    trigger: [""],
    input: [""],
    inputGroup: [""],
    chips: [""],
    chip: [""],
    chipRemove: [""],
    clear: [""],
    icon: [""],
    portal: [""],
    backdrop: [""],
    positioner: [""],
    popup: [""],
    arrow: [""],
    list: [""],
    row: [""],
    item: [""],
    itemIndicator: [""],
    group: [""],
    groupLabel: [""],
    empty: [""],
    status: [""],
  },
});

export * as Combobox from "./index.parts";
export { comboboxStyles } from "./styles";
